meaning: n.梁,桁条,(光线的)束,柱,电波,横梁v.播送
examples: Be careful you don't knock your head on this low beam.
Your calculation is way off beam.
Len studied it a moment in the beam of his torch.
There was an added intention of restoring the Scottish-made beam engine pump machinery to full working order.
The patent-pending technology uses a laser beam's energy to precisely transfer the ultra-thin chips.
